recommendations.title: Life During Wartime
recommendations.overview: Friends, family, and lovers struggle to find love, forgiveness, and meaning in an almost war-torn world riddled with comedy and pathos.

recommendations.title: Welcome to the Dollhouse
recommendations.overview: An unattractive 7th grader struggles to cope with suburban life as the middle child with inattentive parents and bullies at school.

recommendations.title: Storytelling
recommendations.overview: College and high school serve as the backdrop for two stories about dysfunction and personal turmoil.

recommendations.title: Happiness
recommendations.overview: The lives of several individuals intertwine as they go about their lives in their own unique ways, engaging in acts which society as a whole might find disturbing in a desperate search for human connection.

recommendations.title: Wiener-Dog
recommendations.overview: A dachshund passes from oddball owner to oddball owner, whose radically dysfunctional lives are all impacted by the pooch.

recommendations.title: Dark Horse
recommendations.overview: Abe is a man who is in his thirties and who lives with his parents. He works regretfully for his father while pursuing his hobby of collecting toys. Aware that his family doesn't think highly of him, he tries to spark a relationship with Miranda, who

recommendations.title: The Boy Who Harnessed the Wind
recommendations.overview: Against all the odds, a thirteen year old boy in Malawi invents an unconventional way to save his family and village from famine.

recommendations.title: Breakthrough
recommendations.overview: Tragedy strikes when a woman named Joyce's son falls through the ice on a frozen lake and is trapped underwater for over 15 minutes. After being rushed to the hospital, the 14-year-old boy continues to fight for his life as Joyce, her husband and the

recommendations.title: Turning Red
recommendations.overview: Thirteen-year-old Mei is experiencing the awkwardness of being a teenager with a twist – when she gets too excited, she transforms into a giant red panda.

recommendations.title: The Life Aquatic with Steve Zissou
